ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent of the country */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "area" INTEGER /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Primary currency of the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language(s) of the country */,
  "government_type" TEXT /* Type of government */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "covid_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the data belongs to */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of cases in the country */,
  "new_cases" INTEGER /* New cases reported in the country */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Total number of deaths in the country */,
  "new_deaths" INTEGER /* New deaths reported in the country */,
  "total_recovered" INTEGER /* Total number of recoveries in the country */,
  "active_cases" INTEGER /* Number of active cases in the country */,
  "serious_critical" INTEGER /* Number of serious or critical cases in the country */,
  "total_cases_per_million" REAL /* Total number of cases per million population */,
  "total_deaths_per_million" REAL /* Total number of deaths per million population */,
  "date_of_data" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "total_tests" INTEGER /* Total number of tests conducted */,
  "tests_per_million" REAL /* Number of tests conducted per million population */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is vaccinated */,
  "lockdown_status" TEXT /* Current lockdown status */,
  "travel_restrictions" TEXT /* Current travel restrictions */,
  "infection_rate" REAL /* Infection rate (new cases per 100,000 population per week) */,
  "recovery_rate" REAL /* Recovery rate (percentage of total cases that have recovered) */,
  "mortality_rate" REAL /* Mortality rate (percentage of total cases that have resulted in death) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data source was last updated */,
  "reliability_score" INTEGER /* Reliability score for the data source (1-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data update */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being updated */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source providing the update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the update was made */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the data entry */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the changes made in the update */,
  "verified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who verified the data update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_updates_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_updates_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES covid_data ("data_id")
)
